chapters.title: CHAPTER 1: The Demon Invasion
chapters.text:
Welcome, adventurer! Our village has been invaded by demons.
To recover our village you must find the sword of the gods.
But first you must find the magic elixir 
that will help you on your adventure.

chapters.title: CHAPTER 2: The Magic Elixir
chapters.text:
Congratulations! You have found the magic elixir.
This is your chance to defeat the demon king.
We all support you.
We await your triumphant return.
